message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant SearchWindowUI
participant SearchOnAnotherInstanceController
participant NetworkFactory
participant UDP_ClientImpl
participant Thread
participant TCP_ClientImpl
participant SpreadCheet
participant UDP_ClientImpl_03
participant TCP_ClientImpl_03
participant SearchWindowController

User -> SearchWindowUI: start searching instances
SearchWindowUI -> SearchOnAnotherInstanceController: create(address)
SearchOnAnotherInstanceController -> NetworkFactory: Obj = getUDPClientImpl(availableInstances)
NetworkFactory -> UDP_ClientImpl_03: create()
UDP_ClientImpl -> Thread: create(obj)
UDP_ClientImpl -> Thread: start()
UDP_ClientImpl -> Thread: join()
SearchWindowUI -> SearchOnAnotherInstanceController: checkIfIsAvailable()
SearchOnAnotherInstanceController -> NetworkFactory: getInfo(destination)
NetworkFactory -> TCP_ClientImpl_03: create()
SearchOnAnotherInstanceController -> Thread: create(Object)
SearchOnAnotherInstanceController -> Thread: start()
SearchOnAnotherInstanceController -> TCP_ClientImpl_03: getInfo()
SpreadCheet -> UDP_ClientImpl_03: getInfo()
Thread -> Thread: join()
@enduml
